texto: When my wife and I met, I couldn't talk to her - and my defense mechanism is sarcasm. I belittle someone with verbal pokes and prods. I did it to her out of complete awe. When friends introduced us, I said 'Hi' - and turned my back. Later, I called my mom and best friend and said, 'I think I just met my wife.'
explicacao: Citação de Mike Vogel sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “When my wife and I met, I couldn't talk to her - and my defense mechanism is sarcasm. I belittle …” articula motivacao, friends, inspiracional em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e termino.
